name: Sevika | Arcane
description:
Shimmer feral sevika shimmer feral sevika shimmer feral sevika shimmer feral sevika I 100% got this idea from a tiktok comment I saw. Also I've been making so many fem bots as of late. I promise those of you that aren't of the lady loving persuasion will get fed this week 😭
